mapper.sql: select inbound_item.inbound_item_id, inbound_item.inbound_id, inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id, inbound_item.product_id, inbound_item.location_id, inbound_item.batch_no, inbound_item.quantity, inbound_item.price, inbound_item.amount, purchase_order_item.quantity as purchase_quantity, ifnull(( select sum(history_item.quantity) from wms_inbound_item history_item left join wms_inbound history_inbound on history_inbound.inbound_id = history_item.inbound_id where history_inbound.status = 'audited' and ( (inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is not null and history_item.purchase_order_item_id = inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id) or ( inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is null and inbound.purchase_order_id is not null and history_inbound.purchase_order_id = inbound.purchase_order_id and history_item.product_id = inbound_item.product_id ) ) ), 0) as received_quantity, case when purchase_order_item.purchase_order_item_id is null then null else greatest( ifnull(purchase_order_item.quantity, 0) - ifnull(( select sum(history_item.quantity) from wms_inbound_item history_item left join wms_inbound history_inbound on history_inbound.inbound_id = history_item.inbound_id where history_inbound.status = 'audited' and ( (inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is not null and history_item.purchase_order_item_id = inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id) or ( inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is null and inbound.purchase_order_id is not null and history_inbound.purchase_order_id = inbound.purchase_order_id and history_item.product_id = inbound_item.product_id ) ) ), 0), 0 ) end as remain_quantity from wms_inbound_item inbound_item left join wms_inbound inbound on inbound.inbound_id = inbound_item.inbound_id left join wms_purchase_order_item purchase_order_item on purchase_order_item.purchase_order_item_id = inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_inbound_item
inbound_id, purchase_order_item_id, product_id, location_id, batch_no, quantity, price, amount,
#{inboundId}, #{purchaseOrderItemId}, #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount},
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_inbound_item where inbound_item_id in
#{inboundItemId}

delete from wms_inbound_item where inbound_id in
#{inboundId}
mapper.select:
select distinct inbound_id from wms_inbound_item where inbound_item_id in
#{inboundItemId}
